info.title: Kaseki Agent API
info.description: Ephemeral coding-agent runner: orchestrates Pi CLI via Docker for automated code modifications with validation and deployment

get.description: Returns 200 OK if the service is running. No authentication required.
Returns 200 OK when the service is ready to accept requests. Checks queue and scheduler dependencies. No authentication required.
Returns Prometheus-formatted metrics (artifact cache + queue stats)
Validates that the controller (Docker, image, GitHub App) is configured correctly. Returns checks for all dependencies.

post.description: Validates the task configuration before submitting a run. Performs pre-flight checks on the task prompt and constraints.

changedFilesAllowlist.description: File patterns to allow changes in

enabled.description: Enable automatic lint cleanup before final quality checks

commands.description: Cleanup commands to run before final quality checks

enabled.description: Enable the pre-coding Pi scouting phase

model.description: Optional Pi model override for scouting

enabled.description: Enable the post-validation goal-check Pi evaluator

maxRetries.description: Maximum coding-agent retries after goal-check misses

model.description: Optional Pi model override for goal checking

enabled.description: Enable the final run evaluation phase

model.description: Optional Pi model override for run evaluation

timeoutSeconds.description: Optional run evaluation timeout in seconds

publishMode.description: Publishing mode after validation: pr creates a normal pull request (controller default when omitted), draft_pr creates a draft pull request, branch pushes only, auto publishes when credentials are available and skips if missing, none skips publishing

startupCheck.description: Start a worker container and exit after boot checks

startupCheckMode.description: Startup check depth: boot-only container smoke test or baseline validation dry-run

post.description: Submits a new job to the queue. Returns 202 Accepted with job metadata. Use the ID to poll status.

timeoutSeconds.description: Optional run evaluation timeout in seconds

publishMode.description: Publishing mode after validation: pr creates a normal pull request (controller default when omitted), draft_pr creates a draft pull request, branch pushes only, auto publishes when credentials are available and skips if missing, none skips publishing

startupCheck.description: Start a worker container and exit after boot checks

startupCheckMode.description: Startup check depth: boot-only container smoke test or baseline validation dry-run

200.description: Idempotency replay: job already exists with same configuration

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the job was created

cached.description: True when returned from idempotency replay

completedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the job completed

error.description: Error message if the job failed

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the job was created

cached.description: True when returned from idempotency replay

completedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the job completed

error.description: Error message if the job failed

get.description: Returns paginated list of all kaseki runs, newest first. Includes basic metadata for each run.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of runs to return

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the job was created

cached.description: True when returned from idempotency replay

completedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the job completed

error.description: Error message if the job failed

get.description: Returns current status of a kaseki run, including progress, elapsed time, and timeout risk percentage.

post.description: Cancels a queued or running kaseki job. Returns 200 if cancellation was accepted; operation may complete asynchronously.

get.description: Returns progress events for a run. Supports Server-Sent Events (SSE) streaming via `?stream=sse` query parameter.

parameters.name: stream
parameters.description: Set to "sse" to enable Server-Sent Events streaming

schema.description: Each line is a JSON progress event

get.description: Returns a specific log file (stdout, stderr, validation, progress, quality, or secret-scan). Large logs are truncated.
Returns metadata for all available artifacts from a run (metadata.json, git.diff, validation.log, etc.)
Downloads a specific artifact file (e.g., git.diff, metadata.json, result-summary.md). Use `/api/runs/{id}/artifacts` to list available files.

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Optional response mode. `rendered` is only supported for `run-evaluation.json`; default (omitted) returns raw artifact content.

parameters.name: markdown
parameters.description: When format=rendered for run-evaluation.json, include optional markdown summary.

422.description: Invalid artifact content for requested format

get.description: Returns a comprehensive post-run analysis including metadata, changes, validation results, and failure details.
Aggregates recent terminal run-evaluation artifacts, stage timings, and compact run entries for continual improvement dashboards.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of recent terminal runs to aggregate

post.description: Tests a webhook configuration by sending a test event to the specified URL.

model.description: Optional Pi model override for scouting

enabled.description: Enable the final run evaluation phase

timeoutSeconds.description: Optional run evaluation timeout in seconds

publishMode.description: Publishing mode after validation: pr creates a normal pull request (controller default when omitted), draft_pr creates a draft pull request, branch pushes only, auto publishes when credentials are available and skips if missing, none skips publishing

startupCheck.description: Start a worker container and exit after boot checks

startupCheckMode.description: Startup check depth: boot-only container smoke test or baseline validation dry-run

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the job was created

cached.description: True when returned from idempotency replay

completedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the job completed

error.description: Error message if the job failed

elapsedSeconds.description: Elapsed time since job start in seconds

timeoutRiskPercent.description: Percentage of timeout used (0-100+); values >85 indicate imminent timeout

validationFailureReason.description: Validation-related failure reason, including validation allowlist gates when present

validationAllowlistFailureReason.description: Dedicated reason when files changed during validation are outside KASEKI_VALIDATION_ALLOWLIST

qualityFailureReason.description: Quality gate failure reason (retained for compatibility)

goalCheckFailureReason.description: Goal-check failure reason when the goal-check evaluator fails or rejects the run

resultDir.description: Path to results directory on server

diagnosticFiles.description: Additional diagnostic artifact files recommended for the current failure reason

BearerAuth.description: Bearer token authentication. Provide your API key (from KASEKI_API_KEYS environment variable) as the bearer token.
